creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On FreeBSD 13-STABLE (FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #78 stable/13-n248948-9418a626103: Thu Jan 13 19:36:41 CET 2022 amd64) and most recent ports tree, compilation and installation of the port 

graphics/drm-fbsd13-kmod

fails on a local host installed via portmaster and also on all poudriere building hosts running the very same FBSD13 jails.

The sources build without issue, but "make install" fails with weird Linux crap:

[...]

The operation will free 11 MiB.
